biography: Mikael is a familiar face around Kurk Golf, where he hones his skills with a dedication that is only matched by his calm demeanor. Known for his thoughtful approach to the game, Mikael brings a strategic element to every round, carefully considering each move before executing with precision.

While some might perceive Mikael's quiet nature as reserved, those who know him understand that his focus is unwavering when he steps onto the green. He analyses the course meticulously, seeking out every advantage to gain an edge over his opponents.

Mikael has participated once in past Hector Trophée events. Although he is considered retired from Hector events, the possibility of a comeback always lingers in the air. Spectators admire Mikael, because they appreciate his profound understanding of golf.
